sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39214" key="e)pidialla/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιδιαλλ-άσσω</orth>, <sense id="n39214.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bring to reconciliation</tr_>, ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0526.tlg001.perseus-grc1:16:6:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.6.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
